title: Yours for the Asking
writer: Eve Greene, Harlan Ware, Philip MacDonald
actors: George Raft, Dolores Costello, Ida Lupino
plot: Casino operator Johnny Lamb hires down-on-her-luck socialite Lucille Sutton as his casino hostess, in order to help her and to improve casino income. But Lamb's pals fear that he could follow Lucille onto the straight-and-narrow p...
